aboutx.numLead: Central Hesse, Auweg 3 — where KWT GmbH develops and manufactures the complete K-Aqua programme.

nums.l: of pipe per day and extrusion line — capacity for large projects
dimension range of pipe production, fittings up to 315 mm
of offcuts and production waste return to the material cycle
quality, environment, energy — DAkkS-accredited since October 2025

aboutx.prodLead: From granulate to the marked pipe — how the product is made.

prod.d: Monolayer and glass-fibre reinforced multilayer pipes are produced on extrusion lines with up to 14,000 metres of daily output each.
Fittings from d20 to d315 are injection-moulded — complex geometries at high volume and constant quality.
Process water circulates in a closed loop — water protection as a system decision, monitored under ISO 14001.
Every pipe is continuously marked during extrusion and tested per the QA manual — traceability by batch.

aboutx.houseLead: KWT’s company policy treats benefit as a cycle — none exists without the other three.

house.d: The wishes of customers and interested parties are recognised, taken seriously and implemented — in compliance with legal and social standards.
All employees are involved in the continuous improvement process — no customer benefit without employee benefit.
Quality always stays compatible with cost and deadlines — today’s success carries tomorrow’s investment.
Resource conservation and environmental compatibility are part of the understanding of quality — anchored in the GENAU system.

miles.d: Plastics processing for water supply — experience that flows into every batch.
A long-standing community of values with the premium manufacturer "Leading in Drainage".

miles.t: Management system in the House of KWT
miles.d: Occupational safety, environment and energy as every employee’s daily practice — not an audit exercise.
ISO 9001, 14001 and 50001 in one step — DAkkS-accredited, valid until 10/2028.
Product Finder, CO₂ calculator, Trust Center and Academy turn the website into a toolbox.
